hook_archetypes.name: Specific number opener
hook_archetypes.example_scaffold: We cut [X] by [Y%] in [Z weeks] using [tool] + [workflow].

hook_archetypes.name: Counterintuitive constraint
hook_archetypes.structure: Everyone optimizes X. We won by ignoring X and doubling down on Y.
hook_archetypes.example_scaffold: Everyone bought [big tool]. Speed came from [smaller thing] + discipline.

hook_archetypes.name: Question with stakes
hook_archetypes.structure: What would you do if [constraint]? Here's the playbook we used.
hook_archetypes.example_scaffold: What if you could only ship with [Claude/Excel/MCP] this quarter?

hook_archetypes.name: Mini-story arc
hook_archetypes.example_scaffold: Last Tuesday our sheet broke at row 200k. Here's how we recovered.

hook_archetypes.name: List tease with proof
hook_archetypes.structure: 3 lessons from [project]. The third one hurt.
hook_archetypes.example_scaffold: 3 lessons from wiring Claude into Excel without creating spreadsheet chaos.

credibility_moves: Name the exact tool and version/workflow surface
Quote a measurable outcome or time saved
Reference a dated rollout, incident, or benchmark window

high_engagement: Ask a specific question tied to one variable (tool, team size, stack)

anti_patterns: Claims with no number or tool
